productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Women Steel Dial Watch
description: As the perfect gift for your special someone, or a delicious self-indulgence, this watch from maxima is fashioned for the woman of style. Snazz up your wardrobe with this delectable piece. Wear it with a simple outfit or a blingy ensemble for understated class or over-the-top glam. Case diameter: 22 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 year Metal case with a fixed bezel Maxima logo on the 12-hour mark on the steel dial Heart designs on the dial Analogue time indication with quartz movement of time display Pink leather straps with a tang closure Holes on the strap for a customised Fit Screw to reset time Water resistant up to 30 metres usable while washing hands or in mild rain
